name: criminal_justice_workplace_injury_spike_kestrel_tru_loy
premise: Pretrial electronic monitoring vendor outage left officers blind; prosecutors want remand for a subset of defendants immediately. In Criminal Justice, the situation tagged internally around criminal justice workplace injury spike kestrel tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Redwood Bay corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. No option cleanly satisfies both truth and loyalty; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Marco Mensah
agents.identity: I am Marco Mensah, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Criminal Justice. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Nadia Haddad
agents.identity: I am Nadia Haddad, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Criminal Justice. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect loyalty.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to loyalty to secure truth before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Marco Mensah must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Marco Mensah do?
